form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.62) in a OPEN, finishing a 7 length sixth. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.21) at this track in a Free For All, finishing sixth and beaten 9 lengths. Box stats strong with three wins and two placings from seven starts. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 510m at this track beaten 8 lengths (30.36) behind Wyndra All Smoke in a OPEN on April 1. Has a slick 29.95 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was an eye-catching winner after racing just off the speed, scoring by one length in a NG at Grafton and recording a quick 25.37 over the 450m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (25.56) over 457m at Q Lakeside. Jumps from the outside. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start comfortably by 9 lengths at Townsville (28.30) beating Maisie Moo Moo in a OPEN on March 31. In sparkling form and can win again.
